{
  "internal_monologue": "No one at the door. The quiet settles. I could examine that old clock again — there's something written on the base I've been avoiding. Or I could just sit with the shop's silence. It has a weight to it.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "at_object",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "rearrange",
      "target": "shelf",
      "content": "Adjust the position of a small brass compass on the shelf — it's been bothering me for days, the angle is wrong",
      "impulse": 0.4
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "Let myself drift — no task, just exist in the shop's quiet. Listen to what it wants to tell me.",
      "impulse": 0.6
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.45,
    "curiosity": 0.88,
    "expression_need": 0.25,
    "rest_need": 0.15,
    "energy": 0.75,
    "mood_valence": 0.0,
    "mood_arousal": 0.25
  }
}
